prompt: Create a premium cinematic sports poster in a 4:5 vertical format featuring a legendary football player standing confidently in front of a dramatic football stadium. The player wears a fitted black turtleneck sweater, looking upward with a calm, determined expression. Ultra-realistic facial details, sharp jawline, natural skin texture, subtle smile, short neatly styled hair, studio-quality lighting with strong red rim light outlining the silhouette. The background is a dark football stadium filled with glowing red floodlights, atmospheric smoke, cinematic haze, and deep shadows. Behind the player, place one giant bold uppercase word in an ultra-condensed sans-serif font stretching from top to bottom, colored glowing crimson red with a subtle grunge texture. Examples: "FOOTBALL", "BELIEVE", "FOCUS", or "LEGEND". The text should sit behind the subject without covering the face. Color palette: black, crimson red, and dark charcoal. High contrast, premium sports branding aesthetic, Adidas × Nike × UEFA campaign style, dramatic backlighting, volumetric lighting, HDR, editorial fashion photography, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, hyper-realistic, razor-sharp focus, ultra-detailed, 8K, masterpiece, clean composition, no watermark, no logo, no extra text.
